data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the construction site report. While the linked use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature or its functionality. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the digital signature requirement is met.
gaps: No concrete evidence confirming the functionality of the digital signature feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for digital signature functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the digital signature requirement.
